assignments.name: text
assignments.value:
🤖 *Bot Menu*

*SYSTEM*
/cpu - CPU temp + usage
/memory - RAM usage
/disk - Disk space
/uptime - Pi uptime
/top - Top 5 processes

*NETWORK*
/ip - Local + public IP
/ports - Open ports
/vpn - WireGuard status

*DOCKER*
/containers - All containers
/stopped - Stopped containers
/start <name> - Start container
/stop <name> - Stop container
/restart <name> - Restart container

*SECURITY*
/logins - Recent SSH logins

parameters.command: df -h | grep -v tmpfs | grep -v udev
docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}'
echo "Temp: $(vcgencmd measure_temp 2>/dev/null || cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone0/temp | awk '{printf "%.1f C", $1/1000}')" && echo "CPU: $(top -bn1 | grep 'Cpu(s)' | awk '{print $2+$4"%"}')"
uptime -p && echo "Since: $(uptime -s)"
ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -6 | awk 'NR>1{printf "%s - CPU:%s%% MEM:%s%%\n", $11, $3, $4}'
echo "Local: $(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}')" && echo "Public: $(curl -s ifconfig.me)"
ss -tlnp | grep LISTEN | awk '{print $4, $6}' | sort

result=$(docker exec wg-easy wg show 2>/dev/null | awk '/^peer/{if(ep!="")printf "%s|%s|%s
",ip,ep,hs; ep="";hs="";ip=""} /endpoint/{ep=$2} /latest handshake/{hs=$3" "$4" "$5} /allowed ips/{ip=$3} END{if(ep!="")printf "%s|%s|%s
",ip,ep,hs}'); if [ -z "$result" ]; then echo 'No connected peers'; else db=$(docker exec wg-easy cat /etc/wireguard/wg0.json 2>/dev/null); echo "$result" | while IFS='|' read ip ep hs; do cleanip=$(echo $ip | cut -d'/' -f1); name=$(echo "$db" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(next((v['name'] for v in d['clients'].values() if v['address']=='$cleanip'),'$cleanip'))" 2>/dev/null || echo $cleanip); printf "%s
  IP: %s
  Endpoint: %s
  Last seen: %s

" "$name" "$ip" "$ep" "$hs"; done; fi
={{ (() => { const a = $('Extract Command1').first().json.args; return (a && a.trim()) ? 'docker restart ' + a.trim() + ' 2>&1' : 'echo "⚠️ Usage: /restart <container_name>"'; })() }}
={{ (() => { const a = $('Extract Command1').first().json.args; return (a && a.trim()) ? 'docker stop ' + a.trim() + ' 2>&1' : 'echo "⚠️ Usage: /stop <container_name>"'; })() }}
={{ (() => { const a = $('Extract Command1').first().json.args; return (a && a.trim()) ? 'docker start ' + a.trim() + ' 2>&1' : 'echo "⚠️ Usage: /start <container_name>"'; })() }}
docker ps -a --filter status=exited --filter status=dead --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}"
journalctl | grep -iE 'accepted|session opened|failed password|disconnect' | tail -10 | awk '{$1=$2=$3=""; print substr($0,4)}' || echo '-- No entries --'
